##NAMES=Berthierine
##RRUFFID=R110177
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Fe^2+^,Fe^3+^,Al)_3_(Si,Al)_2_O_5_(OH)_4_
##LOCALITY=DeMix quarry, Mont St-Hilaire, Quebec
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Hexagonal prisms, with gray transparent terminations. We sample the terminations.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110177
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 5.388 b: 9.346 c: 7.032 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 354.1 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
